behavior: Gate 4 uses model-free defaults, approves only wired local matching providers, and keeps employer and regional data behind existing local, pack, and source-policy owners.
revision_scope: The committed model-provider lock and the Gate 4 model, setup, employer-data, regional-delivery, expiry, and Essentials operating decisions.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-local-ai --features embedded-ml qwen3_lock_approves_only_wired_candle_backends --lib
commands.relevant_result: The fail-first test rejected the speculative FastEmbed, local HTTP, sequence-classification, and Python-sidecar compatibility list, then passed with no alternative Qwen3 backend approved.
commands.caveat: The primary qwen3-candle and qwen3-reranker-candle backends remain accepted through each model's canonical backend field.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-local-ai --features embedded-ml --lib; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-domain --lib
commands.relevant_result: All 75 default embedded local-AI tests passed with 10 explicit model-download tests ignored, and all 151 domain tests passed.
commands.caveat: No model file was downloaded or loaded, and no live provider, source, credential, Keychain, or Tauri process ran.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo clippy -p jobsentinel-local-ai --features embedded-ml --lib -- -D warnings; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo clippy -p jobsentinel-domain --lib -- -D warnings
commands.relevant_result: Strict production-library Clippy passed for both affected Rust owners.
commands.caveat: Focused production-library checks were used instead of unrelated legacy test lint.

commands.command: cargo fmt --all -- --check; npm run lint:docs; npm run lint:security; npm run lint:file-size -- --hard; npm run harness:check; git diff --check
commands.relevant_result: Formatting, documentation, links, prose, security sensors, secret scanning, hard file limits, harness state, and diff validation passed.
commands.caveat: Static repository checks do not replace installed-app, package, performance, or cross-platform proof.

commands.command: Read-only model, data, and adversarial Gate 4 reviews
commands.relevant_result: Independent audits separated supported operating decisions from missing release evidence. Final adversarial review returned APPROVE for the committed boundary.
commands.caveat: The reviewers explicitly kept Gate 4 open.

unapproved_user_facing_thresholds: resume_requirement weak, medium, and strong bands

runtime_and_setup_decisions.stronger_local: Exact checksum-verified Qwen3 Candle embedding and reranker pair after explicit user setup.
runtime_and_setup_decisions.legacy_fallback: Verified MiniLM Candle cache only; never a new default or automatic download.
runtime_and_setup_decisions.external_ai_default: Disabled with provider none. It is not a matching provider.

employer_data_decisions.mode: Live-first and source-specific, with local user history and user-approved official employer or ATS evidence.
employer_data_decisions.optional_bulk_data: A separately removable static Source pack only when no suitable live path exists and license, size, cadence, provenance, and expiry pass review.
employer_data_decisions.excluded: No broad bundled employer database, central private review corpus, hidden lookup, or restricted-page harvesting.

regional_decisions.delivery: Optional user-selected static Region packs with no executable, credential, external AI, or network authority.
regional_decisions.source_authority: Every live source requires its own current SourceManifest and exact operation grant.
regional_decisions.essentials_default: No region pack is installed by default.
regional_decisions.coverage: UK, EU, and India inputs remain incomplete English-only research seeds, not ready region packs.

expiry_decisions.network_sources: Reuse each source manifest's verified_on plus max_age_days owner.
expiry_decisions.static_region_data: Keep reviewed_on as visible provenance. It does not authorize a source or create a universal static-content expiry.
expiry_decisions.history: Staleness blocks refresh or labels evidence stale; it does not delete user-owned or dated observations.

blocked_release_claims: Production-wide Qwen3 calibration and cross-platform score stability.
Model-free 8 GiB package, startup, memory, and core-journey measurements.
Installed stronger-local setup, consent, progress, cancel, retry, removal, and fallback.
Employer dossier accuracy, conflict, freshness, uncertainty, and novice-task evaluation.
Regional pay, location, CV, taxonomy, deterministic, Qwen3, lifecycle, and manual-review evaluation.
Windows 11, macOS 26 and later, and Linux package and runtime matrix.
